_meta.purpose: Verified local-market facts. Generators PREFER this file over inventing numbers. Fields marked `needs_verification: true` must be refreshed before use in public content.
_meta.refresh_cadence: Monthly on the 1st (pair with expired-listings block)

median_price.source: MLS pull, Bell County active inventory

average_rent_3br.note: Varies by zip; 76502 trends higher, 76501 lower

tax_rate_notes.disclaimer: Bell County reassesses annually — verify current rate.

major_employers.name: Fort Hood
major_employers.notes: ~50K active-duty + dependents; BAH drives rental demand

school_district_notes.district: Temple ISD (most of 76501/76504), Belton ISD (south/west edges)
school_district_notes.disclaimer: Verify by address — boundaries change. TEA ratings shift annually.

investor_notes.hospital_district_rule: South Temple odd-numbered streets: above 1200 block = solid, 1100-1200 = decent but verify, below 1100 = must visit in person
investor_notes.tenant_pool_notes: Medical residents (3-5 year stays), military (orders-driven turnover), I-35 industrial workforce

corridors.fort_hood_corridor: Killeen / Harker Heights (closer than Temple itself)

median_price.note: Pull from MLS resale-only-temple-0-1500.csv subset; historically ~5-10% below Temple median

average_rent_3br.note: Correlates with Temple; UMHB + commute to Fort Hood drives demand

tax_rate_notes.notes: Belton ISD tax adds to Bell County base; verify per-property.

school_district_notes.district: Belton ISD (strong reputation; verify by address)

investor_notes.notes: Steadier, more family-driven; lower MTR demand than Temple; LTR strong near UMHB

drivers: Austin commuter overflow via Salado corridor

median_price.note: Historically lower than Temple; Fort Hood BAH drives floor

average_rent_3br.note: Tracks Fort Hood BAH — E-6 w/ dependents $1,920/month

investor_notes.military_income_note: BAH is tax-free and non-counted for debt-to-income in VA underwriting
investor_notes.deployment_risk: PCS orders change quickly — shorter tenant LOS than Temple medical residents

investor_notes.notes: Premium Killeen-adjacent. BAH-capped rents. Family-friendly military buyers. Verify specific streets.
Austin-commuter overflow, luxury segment, thin rental market

physician_loan_matt_levant.notes: Preferred BSW lender; only legal BSW pipeline per Stark Law

banned_data_patterns: Do not publish exact cap rate projections on specific addresses — use range + 'underwrite conservatively'
Do not state guaranteed appreciation — Temple is growing but cycles exist
Do not cite BAH without 'verify current rate at DFAS'
Do not state school ratings without 'verify by address'
